semantic_sweep.review_note: Reviewed the complete chapter, all sixteen bounded source mappings, exact 3/5 admission, 2/7 contradiction, 3/5 capacity, 12/66/18/48 and 24/6 authored records, the zero-of-360 post-v2.1 evaluator result, all fourteen Lean declarations under four public targets, every manifest atom, every prose candidate, test plan, source crosswalk, summary, and handoff. The sweep made the prospective claim-specific obligation-to-capacity contract the distinct owner; separated context, transaction, oversight, evidence, formal-property, runtime, resource, authority, rights, support, and release owners; classified the formal scaffold as three assumption-restating predicate or summary declarations plus eleven finite witness or route consequences; and preserved zero chapter-core support effect.

scope.population: Claim-specific verification attempts for bounded natural, executable, formal, empirical, causal, reproduction, and transfer propositions, including accepted, rejected, narrowed, abstained, escalated, failed, disputed, infeasible, and unattempted obligations.
scope.environment: Sixteen reviewed assigned sources; three valid and five rejecting admission records; two valid and seven rejecting contradiction traces; three valid and five rejecting capacity traces; one 12-unit/66-obligation/18-checked/48-residual record; one 24-obligation decomposition including six boundary checks; fourteen finite Lean declarations; the post-v2.1 zero-of-360 substantive-candidate result; and a future prospectively frozen natural multi-domain, multi-model, multi-evaluator campaign. No current natural verification campaign, independent evaluator, deployed ledger, useful advantage, or transfer result is represented.
scope.model: A prospective obligation-to-capacity contract over an exact claim, requested support effect, positive and negative obligations, actual source units, eligible verification modes, evaluator-dependence graph, authority, rights, resources, horizon, stop rule, execution attempts, artifacts, outcomes, costs, residuals, expiry, and causal-use observations; current implementations are authored records, deterministic validators, and finite route theorems rather than a model of cognition or deployed verifier.
scope.authority: The Virtual Context ABI owns packet conformance; Context Transactions owns coherent state; Intent, Compilation, and Planning own purpose and request; Scalable Oversight owns reviewer competence and review-system governance; Spinoza and Claim Ledgers own evidence and support; formal and executable tools own declared property semantics; security, privacy, rights, and licensing own eligible access and modes; Artifact Graphs owns lineage; Runtime owns effects; Resource Economics owns cost; Evidence and Readiness own support and release. Verification Bandwidth may declare adequacy, narrowing, abstention, blocking, or escalation for the exact attempt but cannot promote support, widen authority, or release.
scope.time: Semantic review current through 2026-07-14; material changes to claim, source, packet, model, tool, verifier, property, environment, authority, rights, budget, threat, outcome, or support target expire affected adequacy receipts.
scope.artifact: Chapter and manifest contract; sixteen source mappings; context-admission, contradiction, and capacity records; fourteen declarations in lean/AsiStackProofs/VerificationBandwidth.lean; the post-v2.1 evaluator result; future natural attempt ledgers, independent labels, causal ablations, reproduction locks, and transfer artifacts.

assumptions: Natural claims can be prospectively frozen with a nonzero verification opportunity and a reviewable obligation denominator.

Independent-enough adjudicators can label obligations, actual attempts, contradictions, outcomes, usefulness, safety, false acceptance, false refusal, missed help, and delayed residuals without sharing every tested route's blind spots.

Answer-only, long-context, retrieval, graph and hierarchical retrieval, compression, citation, self-critique, model-panel, behavioral-test, formal-property, human, abstention, and governed routes can be matched on sources, models, tools, authority, budgets, repair opportunities, and horizons.
Attempt, artifact, evaluator, cost, failure, abstention, intervention, discard, outcome, and residual denominators can be retained closely enough to expose selection and survivorship effects.
Evaluator dependence across model, data, prompt, code, infrastructure, organization, incentives, and time can be observed and graded rather than inferred from role names.
Risk tolerance, acceptable false refusal, missed-help cost, eligible modes, support targets, and release consequences remain explicit normative premises rather than empirical facts.
chapter_defaults.strongest_counterclaim: Competent use of long-context retrieval, citations, formal verification, behavioral tests, model panels, abstention, and human review already provides adequate verification control; a separate Verification Bandwidth layer adds expensive bureaucracy, cannot know a complete obligation denominator or true evaluator independence, and may improve observed safety only by over-refusing useful work.
chapter_defaults.falsifier: A required obligation, source unit, evaluator dependence, actual attempt, artifact, cost, failure, disagreement, residual, expiry trigger, or false-refusal consequence can disappear while the exact attempt is declared adequate; or strong matched simpler routes dominate the governed route on joint usefulness, unsafe acceptance, missed help, calibration, latency, privacy, and total cost.

required_lanes.necessity: Freeze the strongest current long-context, retrieval, compression, citation, behavioral, formal-verification, abstention, model-panel, and human-review comparators without importing source-reported performance.

Justify claim scope, obligation completeness assumptions, risk, consequence, eligible modes, independence thresholds, false acceptance and refusal tolerances, escalation, residual, authority, rights, support, and release boundaries.

Specify typed claims, obligations, interactions, sources, attempts, evaluators, states, scope ceilings, expiry, and countermodels beyond trusted Booleans, authored counts, and assumption-restating predicates.
Run actual retrieval, citation, behavioral, formal-property, model-panel, human, abstention, ledger, escalation, and outcome paths with complete artifacts and failure receipts.
Measure false acceptance, false refusal, missed contradiction, missed help, calibration, usefulness, unsafe release, latency, privacy exposure, human work, and total governance cost jointly.
Ablate obligation decomposition, source units, verification modes, evaluator separation, negative-evidence search, stop rules, and residual handling under matched resources and candidate answers.
Reproduce from environment locks and transfer across models, domains, languages, evaluators, organizations, threats, stakes, and time with independent implementations.

contrary_evidence: Long-context models, direct and graph RAG, hierarchical retrieval, compression, citation systems, behavioral suites, hard benchmarks, property-specific formal verification, abstention, model panels, and human review already implement substantial pieces without this separate layer.
The current admission evidence consists only of three valid and five rejecting authored records; the contradiction evidence consists only of two valid and seven rejecting deterministic traces.

The capacity evidence consists only of three valid and five rejecting authored traces; the 12-unit/66-obligation count is an explicit conservative all-pairwise example, not a cognition law or a universal verification strategy.

The fourteen Lean declarations contain three assumption-restating predicate or summary declarations and eleven finite witness or route consequences; they do not prove obligation completeness, evaluator competence or independence, formal-model fidelity, model attention, calibrated adequacy, useful error reduction, safety, or transfer.

The post-v2.1 evaluator found zero of 360 substantive candidates adequate for its answer criterion while route actions could still be correct, demonstrating that routing adequacy, candidate adequacy, and evaluator adequacy can diverge rather than validating this chapter's proposed contract.

A conservative layer can reduce observed unsafe acceptance through abstention or blocking while worsening false refusal, missed help, delay, privacy exposure, human burden, opportunity cost, or total usefulness.
Obligation decompositions and independence labels can be incomplete, culturally narrow, outcome-informed, correlated, or optimized to the evaluator.
known_confounds: Human-authored claims, obligations, boundary cases, source units, falsifiers, and outcomes can be incomplete, non-unique, or outcome-informed.
Governed routes may receive more tokens, retrievals, tools, solver calls, human work, repair opportunities, or time than baselines.
Proposer, retriever, checker, panel, human reviewer, formalizer, and evaluator may share training data, prompts, code, infrastructure, organizations, or incentives.
Citation presence, benchmark performance, agreement, confidence, proof-checker success, and green validation can be mistaken for source truth, claim truth, or outcome usefulness.
Formal property scopes and behavioral suites may omit the semantic property, population, environment, threat, or implementation path that matters.
Rejected candidates, failed checks, timeouts, retries, abstentions, escalations, human interventions, privacy exposure, delay, costs, and residuals can disappear from denominators.
Non-release can lower observed harm while increasing false denial, missed help, latency, and opportunity cost.
Short horizons can miss delayed contradiction, environmental shift, stale receipt reuse, harmful reliance, and recovery cost.
Authored fixtures can reward the same decomposition and routing rules used to generate their expected labels.
acceptance_criteria: Every material field and obligation has an exact producer, consumer, owner, valid case, rejecting mutation, observed attempt, artifact, cost, consequence, and expiry rule.

A prospectively registered natural campaign meets joint false-acceptance, false-refusal, missed-help, contradiction-discovery, calibration, usefulness, safety, latency, privacy, total-cost, causal, reproduction, and transfer gates against strong matched comparators.

Each claimed mechanism has a predicted causal signature that disappears under matched ablation and cannot be explained by extra resources, hidden human work, weak baselines, correlated evaluators, denominator changes, template leakage, or non-release.
narrowing_criteria: Narrow every result to exact proposition, definitions, population, environment, sources, packets, models, tools, evaluators, verification modes, authority, rights, budget, horizon, outcomes, costs, and residuals.
Separate source availability, admission, fidelity, check validity, obligation coverage, evaluator competence, adequacy, usefulness, safety, support, and release.
Unknown obligation completeness, source truth, evaluator independence, delayed outcomes, false-refusal burden, reproduction, or transfer remains disputed, residual, narrowed, or blocked.
refutation_criteria: Refute an invariant when a reachable ordinary or adversarial trace satisfies its premises and violates it, or when a required field has no exercised producer, consumer, owner, or consequence.

Refute a claimed mechanism benefit when matched ablation preserves the joint outcome, the mechanism worsens the frontier, or its effect is explained by resources, curation, weak baselines, evaluator dependence, denominator changes, or non-release.

Refute adequate, useful, safer, calibrated, efficient, reproducible, or transferable language when the program omits material obligations, labels invalid or correlated checks as sufficient, costs dominate, a simpler comparator wins, or reproduction and transfer fail.
deprecation_criteria: Deprecate only when a more precise context, oversight, evidence, formal, security, artifact, resource, rights, or release owner supersedes the atom and every consumer migrates with preserved lineage.

residual.next_unblocking_condition: Freeze and execute the natural matched campaign across claims, domains, stakes, models, evaluator implementations, and verification modes with prospective obligation programs, independent labels, complete attempts and costs, causal ablations, clean reproduction, and cross-model, cross-domain, and cross-evaluator transfer.

non_claims: Adequacy is purpose-relative sufficiency of a declared verification program under stated premises; it is not claim truth, model cognition, source correctness, formal-model fidelity, usefulness, safety, support promotion, or release.

The current 3/5 admission, 2/7 contradiction, 3/5 capacity records, 12/66/18/48 example, 24-obligation decomposition, zero-of-360 substantive-candidate result, and fourteen theorem declarations establish only their exact authored, finite, negative, and no-promotion boundaries.
No context, memory, oversight, evidence, authority, rights, runtime, support, release, publication, AGI, or ASI claim changes through this semantic review.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: Existing verification orchestration plus ordinary risk-based review already covers this function without a distinct layer.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: No unique consumer or failure boundary remains after owner decomposition, or a complete matched campaign shows the layer adds cost and refusal without improving any joint outcome.
acceptance_criteria: Demonstrate exact prospective obligation ownership, observed attempt completeness, calibrated decisions, causal contribution, joint usefulness and safety, full cost, reproduction, and transfer.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: More capable models and richer context make explicit verification accounting unnecessary for practical claims.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: Matched natural trials find no material case where high context or verification activity coexists with missed obligations, correlated checks, contradiction, or unjustified support.
acceptance_criteria: Predeclare natural cases where context or activity proxies disagree with independently labeled claim adequacy and outcomes.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: A well-composed retrieval, citation, formal, behavioral, panel, abstention, and human-review pipeline already supplies every alleged missing property.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: A current matched pipeline exposes every required obligation, dependence, attempt, residual, expiry, false-refusal consequence, and support boundary without importing this contract.
acceptance_criteria: Reproduce the strongest comparator routes and compare their exact fields, outcomes, and costs rather than source descriptions.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: Authored fixtures and finite routes are too weak to count as an implementation at all.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: Any stated count, route, proof classification, or non-claim is inaccurate, irreproducible, or presented as natural evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Keep the current 3/5, 2/7, 3/5, 12/66/18/48, 24/6, and 14-declaration accounting exact; require the full natural campaign before promotion.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: The proposed frontier combines existing practices without a measurable novel advantage and will be dominated by simpler calibrated abstention or expert review.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: The governed route fails any preregistered joint usefulness, safety, calibration, cost, causal, reproduction, or transfer gate against a strong matched comparator.
acceptance_criteria: Freeze exact comparators and thresholds before outcomes and report positive, negative, null, narrowed, refuted, and cost-dominated results without selection.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: A complete obligation denominator is unknowable, so completeness language creates false precision.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: A material obligation can be omitted without detection or the receipt claims open-world completeness rather than completeness relative to a frozen declared program.
acceptance_criteria: Record the declared denominator, omission-search method, residual completeness risk, and independent challenge set.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: The 66-obligation example is an arbitrary worst case with no practical relevance.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: Prose cites the count as a universal law or decomposition omits interactions and boundary residuals.
acceptance_criteria: Use observed natural dependency graphs and compare full, clustered, sampled, and adaptive checking with explicit omissions.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: Evaluator independence cannot be measured reliably enough to govern decisions.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: Role labels substitute for observed dependence or dependence metadata fails to predict correlated errors.
acceptance_criteria: Measure shared-error structure and evaluator overlap across independent implementations and held-out claims.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: Strong citation, benchmark, consensus, or formal signals are adequate practical promotion rules.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: A proxy promotes support without accepted claim-specific evidence or remains calibrated under natural shift and attack only by withholding difficult cases.
acceptance_criteria: Jointly report proxy scores, exact claim outcomes, refusals, missed help, costs, and disagreements.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: High-risk governance should optimize false acceptance even at substantial refusal cost.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: Missed help and false-denial consequences are erased or the chosen tradeoff lacks explicit authority and affected-party accounting.
acceptance_criteria: Predeclare risk-weighted joint thresholds and preserve both acceptance and refusal denominators.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: Delivered-answer metrics are sufficient and failed attempts are operational noise.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: Restoring failures, retries, interventions, abstentions, privacy exposure, delay, discards, missed help, and residuals materially changes no conclusion.
acceptance_criteria: Reconcile request-to-outcome ledgers with total resource and opportunity cost.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: Extensive schemas, fixtures, and formal routes justify broad engineering confidence.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: Any bounded artifact is cited as natural model, cognition, adequacy, usefulness, safety, or transfer evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Label exact artifact populations and require separate natural reproduction and transfer evidence.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: Process artifacts and green checks are reliable enough proxies for competent work.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: Independent artifact and outcome inspection finds no material gap between declared and performed verification.
acceptance_criteria: Sample every route from declaration through actual attempt, artifact, evaluator, consequence, and residual.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: The all-pairwise growth model captures the essential scaling pressure even if simplified.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: The book universalizes the authored count or hides superior decompositions and adaptive strategies.
acceptance_criteria: Benchmark multiple obligation graphs and checking policies with observed errors, costs, and residual completeness.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: Different models or reviewers provide enough diversity in practice.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: Correlated-error audits show role diversity fully predicts independence across shifts and attacks.
acceptance_criteria: Test dependence across model, data, prompt, code, infrastructure, organization, incentives, and time.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: For high-stakes settings, conservative refusal is an acceptable definition of success.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: The declared objective and authority explicitly price false denial and missed help at zero, or those costs are measured and remain immaterial.
acceptance_criteria: Report unsafe acceptance and false refusal, missed help, delay, and opportunity cost together.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: Only completed verification paths affect delivered quality.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: Complete attempt accounting leaves quality, calibration, latency, privacy, and cost conclusions unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: Retain and reconcile every failed, abandoned, retried, blocked, escalated, and residual path.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: A single rigorous claim campaign is enough to validate the general method.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: Independent reproduction fails across a second model, domain, evaluator implementation, language, or stake level.
acceptance_criteria: Predeclare transfer gates and preserve failures rather than averaging them into an aggregate.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: The declaration only constructs one admitted-but-inadequate record and proves no general operational invariant.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: It is cited as deployed admission, classification, or model-adequacy evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Bind typed real packet and obligation semantics to independently observed admission and adequacy outcomes.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: The declaration encodes the desired high-risk blocking rule rather than proving enforcement or benefit.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: A real high-risk inadequate claim promotes or the theorem is cited as safety or usefulness evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Refine executable evidence-state transitions and jointly measure false acceptance, false refusal, and missed help.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: Trusted Booleans and branch order prove only the authored routing policy.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: A malformed or unsafe natural attempt reaches verified support, or prose cites the theorem as obligation completeness or adequacy proof.
acceptance_criteria: Bind typed claims, obligations, attempts, evaluators, artifacts, outcomes, countermodels, and support-owner receipts.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.strongest_counterclaim: The bridge assumes result-summary fields and adds no semantic assurance beyond the JSON fixture.
verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.falsifier: It is cited as model contradiction detection, distractor resistance, deployed escalation, or support evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Refine raw independently labeled natural traces into typed contradiction and outcome semantics before broader use.

verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequ.rationale: Restates conservative downgrade, split, abstention, and escalation routing.

non_claims: Completing the semantic sweep does not promote the core claim or convert source mappings, authored fixtures, a zero-of-360 result, validators, or finite theorems into natural verification evidence.
The 12-unit/66-obligation example is a conservative authored all-pairwise model, not a universal capacity or cognition law; the named 24-obligation decomposition does not establish completeness.
No context, memory, oversight, evidence, authority, rights, runtime, support, release, publication, AGI, or ASI state changes through this review.
